zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne de Westcott於1413年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾福藍可利時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton30歲，母親Elizabeth Littleton19歲。她於1433年與Thomas Porter在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne de Westcott于1413年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾福藍可利时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton30岁，母亲Elizabeth Littleton19岁。她于1433年与Thomas Porter在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Westcott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): habitational name from any of various minor places called with Old English west ‘west’ + cot ‘cottage, shelter’, for example Westcott (Surrey, Devon, Buckinghamshire), Westcot (Berkshire), or Westcote in (Gloucestershire, Hampshire, and Warwickshire).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne de Westcott was born in 1413, in Frankley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth Littleton, was 19. She married Thomas Porter in 1433, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne de Westcott est née en 1413, à Frankley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Littleton, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Porter en 1433, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne de Westcott 1413 in Frankley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Littleton 19. Sie hat 1433 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Porter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de Westcott è nata il nel 1413 nel Frankley, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Littleton, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Porter nel 1433, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne de Westcottが1413年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフランクリーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttleltonは30歳，母Elizabeth Littletonは19歳であった。1433年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでThomas Porterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne de Westcott(이)가 1413년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 프랭클리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Littleton(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1433년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Thomas Porter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de Westcott nasceu em 1413, em Frankley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Littleton, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Porter em 1433, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne de Westcott родилась в 1413 г. в местности фрэнкли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Littleton, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Porter в 1433 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne de Westcott nació en 1413, en Frankley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Littleton, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Thomas Porter en 1433, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija.
